name: codex-agent-teams
description: Codex plugin and MCP wrapper for lead-managed teammate runners with shared task and mailbox state.

interface.shortDescription: Coordinate named Codex teammates through shared tasks, mailbox messages, and lead-managed cleanup
interface.longDescription: Use Codex Agent Teams to create a lead-managed workflow with shared tasks, teammate mailbox messaging, detached Codex runner loops, and a local MCP control plane.
defaultPrompt: Create a review team with security, performance, and tests teammates
Split a feature into tasks and let named teammates claim work
Run a shared-task debugging session with multiple hypotheses
